meaning: 丹吉尔 [摩洛哥北部港市]
examples: If you see her, say hello, she might be in Tangier.
I was in a market in Tangier and bingo! I found this.
In 1932, during the Spanish civil war, he took up residence in Tangier.
The international port of Tangier in those years, in comparison, seems like a provincial backwater.
Ittihad Tangier are hoping to steal a march on their rivals with this deal.
